# miami   Beach   life   at new     heights

## BAY AND OCEAN RESIDENCES ATOP   MIAMI’S MOST GROUNDBREAKING PROJECT

The newest residential tower has arrived on Miami Beach with unprecedented views in every direction. Five Park

features exceptional amenities across 50,000 square feet with in-house wellness, private beach club, and a three acre

park outside your front door. A true stunning creation from the world’s most visionary design minds.

Available in 1 to 3 bedroom configurations, Five Park floorplans are designed to cater to a range of lifestyles. Prices at

Five Park start at $1.25 million.

[Inside The FIVE PARK Residences](https://fivepark.com/residences)

[![](https://fivepark.com/uploads/images/homepage/VidCover.jpg)](https://fivepark.com/#)

[![](https://fivepark.com/uploads/images/homepage/VidCover_Mobile.jpg)](https://fivepark.com/#)

* * *

## FIVE PARK IS changing the way we live on the beach now, and forever

![](https://fivepark.com/assets/images/building/residences.svg?v=0.01)![](https://fivepark.com/assets/images/building/park.svg?v=0.01)![](https://fivepark.com/assets/images/building/canopy-club-new.svg?v=0.01)![](https://fivepark.com/assets/images/building/bridge.svg?v=0.01)![](https://fivepark.com/uploads/images/homepage/default-new.svg)

### The Residences

Five Park Miami Beach boasts the city’s most incredible views and immense, light-filled living spaces

[See More](https://fivepark.com/residences)

### Daniel Buren’s Bridge

Renowned artist Daniel Buren creates Miami Beach’s most prominent work of public art while bringing the best of the neighborhood in reach

[See More](https://fivepark.com/miami-beach#the-buren-bridge)

### Five Park Canopy Club

Miami Beach’s first residents only members club whose offerings, amenities, and services create a new standard of living for the city

[See More](https://fivepark.com/amenities)

### Canopy Park

A green oasis between beach and bay, Five Park’s Canopy Park is three acres of lush greenery, ample gathering areas, and contemplative space

[See More](https://fivepark.com/the-park)

![](https://fivepark.com/uploads/images/homepage/Amenity%20Level%20Towards%20Downtown.jpg)

# Five Park

500 Alton Rd Miami Beach FL 33139

8.13

MCI RANK

Five Park is a luxury condominium building completed in 2025, designed by Arquitectonica, co-developed by Terra Group and GFO Investments, and featuring interiors by Gabellini Sheppard. Rising 48 stories, Five Park is Miami Beach’s tallest tower at 518 feet high. Five Park has 226 condo residences, comprising two- to five-bedroom floor plans ranging in size from 1,434 to 6,000 interior square feet (see Five Park floor plans: [Park Residences](https://www.miamicondoinvestments.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/06/Five-Park-Floor-Plans-Park-Residences.pdf "Five Park floor plans") and [Canopy Residences](https://www.miamicondoinvestments.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/06/Five-Park-Floor-Plans-Canopy-Residences.pdf "Five Park Canopy floor plans")). The condos at Five Park feature fully finished units with private elevators, open floor plans, 10-foot-high ceilings, Gabellini Sheppard custom-designed kitchens, finished-floor terraces, stone countertops, Gabellini Sheppard custom-designed master bathrooms, large walk-in closets, and Gaggenau appliances. Five Park offers views of the Miami skyline, Biscayne Bay, and the Atlantic Ocean.

## Five Park Amenities

Residents of Five Park enjoy a number of wonderful amenities, including a 24/7 concierge, a co-working area with private offices, a children’s learning lab, a screening room, luxury short-term guest suites, a resident-only pool bar & café, housekeeping services available, Beach Club transportation, a fully-outfitted gym, spa, and treatment rooms.  Additionally, residents have access to a sky gaze from the club lounge, a private jewel box bar, and can take advantage of the Canopy Club’s private dining room and wellness lounge.

## Five Park Location in Miami Beach

Five Park is located in Miami Beach’s [South Beach](https://www.miamicondoinvestments.com/south-beach-condos "South Beach") neighborhood at 500 Alton Road. Its location places residents of Five Park within walking distance of Miami Beach’s shopping district, restaurants, and Flamingo Park. By car, Five Park is 15 minutes from the Miami Design District, 20 minutes from the Miami International Airport, and 8 minutes from the Kaseya Center.

## Amenities

- Residents-only pool bar and cafe
- Fully-outfitted gym
- Spa and treatment rooms
- Screening room
- Co-working area with private offices and board rooms
- Children's learning lab and teen club
- Luxury short-term guest suites for friends and family
- 24-hour concierge and butler service
- Housekeeping services available
- Beach Club transportation via electric Moke
- State-of-the-art fiber-optics to provide high-quality internet and WiFi service from every corner of Five Park residences and amenities, even garage and elevator spaces

Outdoor Amenities

- The adjacent 3-acre Canopy Park features a MONSTRUM Playground, an outdoor gym, picnic areas, dog park, shaded gardens, and art installations
- The verdant, plant-filled amenity deck boasts breathtaking sunset views of the Miami skyline and bay, visible from both the adult & family-friendly pools. The expansive space also offers


unmatched relaxation with shaded trellises, a sunset terrace, numerous cabanas and lounges, and a meditation deck.
- Private Beach Club located South of Fifth, with lounge chairs, umbrellas, and towel service

The Canopy Club - Miami Beach's First Residents-Only Member Club (Level 26)

- Sky gaze from club lounge, dining, and living rooms outfitted with outdoor terraces that host amazing views of downtown Miami and Miami Beach
- Engage in a quiet night in at the clubroom den
- Enjoy elegant, secluded entertainment options at the private jewel box bar, lounge, and


billiards rooms
- Take advantage of the Canopy Club’s private dining room, perfect for special events
- A club-level dining experience curated seasonally by a host of visiting renowned chefs
- A wellness lounge outfitted with private training areas, an outdoor workout zone, exercise bikes, yoga deck, and juice bar amid spectacular bay and ocean views
- In-house personal trainer and wellness coach
- Women’s and men’s spa lounges, each with separate saunas, a hammam, and a dedicated massage and treatment room
- Dedicated club-level concierge

Read more

![](https://www.miamicondoinvestments.com/wp-content/themes/mci/assets/img/layer2.png)

## Features

- Private Elevator
- Expansive, open floor plans
- Soaring 10-foot-high ceilings
- 10-foot-wide sliding door openings
- Finished floor terraces

Kitchen

- Custom-designed kitchens by Gabellini Sheppard
- Gaggenau appliances with ducted cooktop vents
- Italian-made kitchen cabinets
- Stone countertops and backsplashes
- Accent colored frosted glass upper cabinets
- Integrated wood-topped dining tables

Master Suite

- Large walk-in closets
- Master bathrooms custom-designed by Gabellini Sheppard featuring Italian-made vanities and textured glass shower doors
- Wet rooms in select units

Secondary Bathrooms

- Design-forward Hansgrohe bathroom fixtures

Tech & Appliances

- Front-loading washers and ducted, vented dryers for clean and quiet laundry access
- Custom Five Park app allows you to conveniently manage your amenity and at-home experience
- Residences are prepped with platinum pre-wiring
